steps.title: Identify the comparison signal
steps.content: The underlined phrase contains “much like”—a direct comparison that anchors the experimental filters to something familiar.

steps.title: Determine the function of the comparison
steps.content:
By connecting an unfamiliar tool to a familiar reference (3D movie glasses), the phrase helps readers grasp the experimental setup.

The other three choices misidentify what the comparison does:
  • A treats it as describing prior use
  • B invents a problem
  • C attributes it to contrasting studies


That is the correct answer.
